content:
Dance With Me (Gm)
Debelah Morgan

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nnr1gkTB8Gc

[Intro]
[ch]Gm[/ch]
([ch]D[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] - single note)

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] [ch]F5[/ch]   [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Let's dance, 'till we go crazy[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]D7[/ch]

Each step will feel so fine one dance and you'll be mine[/tab]

So baby when we hit the floor you'll be asking for more[/tab]
